title: Require Native Service oRPC Composition
forbids: a runtime namespace import from an oRPC composition vendor, a type-only binding presented as runtime authority, or a base, service, or module missing its named native first ownership hop; combined runtime and other type-only named specifiers remain valid
why: A few positive runtime-binding facts keep the first native oRPC ownership hop visible without dictating harmless named-import formatting or allowing erased type-only imports to impersonate runtime authority.
remediate: Use named runtime vendor bindings, optionally alongside other type-only named specifiers. Directly initialize standalone base from runtime implementEffect(contract, ...), and keep the first runtime imported-base, implement(contract).$context<...>(), or imported-service-branch hop visible inside the matching service or module initializer. Leave outer wrappers and router completeness to TypeScript and review.
message: Service composition must preserve its small set of direct native ownership facts.
